name: databricks-query-v015
description: Run a SQL query against Databricks via the [databricks] extra, write the rows to disk, and return a chat-inline confirmation. Reads DATABRICKS_SERVER_HOSTNAME / DATABRICKS_HTTP_PATH / DATABRICKS_TOKEN from the bridge process env. Designed for the Database mode in the Electron UI when the Databricks adapter is selected.

query.description: SQL query. Free Edition workspaces have samples.bakehouse pre-populated (sales_transactions, sales_customers, media_customer_reviews, etc.).

with.text: Databricks query returned rows; results saved.
